creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Announce: http://foo-projects.org/pipermail/xfce/2011-March/028448.html

This version works only with Xfce >= 4.8, because Ristretto now dependants of libxfce4ui (in ports tree called x11/libxfce4menu).

Fix pkg-plist, delete only locales directories, which are not in Templates/BSD.local.dist

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
